bird.summary: The magnolia warbler (Setophaga magnolia) is a member of the wood warbler family Parulidae. Etymology The genus name Setophaga is from Anci…

relations.subject: Magnolia warbler
relations.evidence: While the deforestation does decrease the warbler population in the specific area that it occurs in, the species is not significantly impacted overall due to the general abundance of the species throughout the region.{{cite journal|last1=Germaine|first1= S
